title: As fans protest Sony's decision to end the production of discs, an industry analyst reports that only 7 PlayStation games have sold more than 100,000 physical copies in the US this year
summary: Writing on Bluesky , Piscatella said, "Two PlayStation video games sold more than 10,000 physical units in the US during the week ending July 11, 2026. "Seven have sold more than 100,000 physical units year-to-date." He also clarified later that the figures…
